sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 42

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 42:1
items.html:
(to the question) Zivug Minei uVei [coupling from itself and within itself]
If the Partzuf couples with the Nukva [female] in its own body, and not with a Nukva separated from it, this is called a Zivug Minei uVei: "Minei" [from itself] refers to the male side in it, and "Bei" [within itself] refers to the Nukva side in it. (p. 755, Item 32)
